channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Dignified transfer for Kentucky soldier who was the 7th US service member to die in Iran war
item.description: Vice President JD Vance joined the grieving family of a Kentucky man who was the seventh U.S. service member to die in combat during the Iran war as his remains were brought back to the U.S.

item.title: In a time of war with Iran, Americans unite in aggravation over sticker shock at the gas pump
Georgia voters choosing a successor to Marjorie Taylor Greene in US House
